Members of a [[Species/Legends|species]] of '''flying flower creatures''' lived on the [[Floating Mountain]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. While at first they could be mistaken for simple [[Plant/Legends|plants]], the creatures were actually capable of communicating with other beings. They had a somewhat [[Lizard/Legends|lizard]]-like build and petal-wings that rotated, allowing them to fly.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|The Crystal Cloak}} {{1st}}
